title: Hold'em Fold'em Poker
description:
Hold'em Fold'em Poker is a relaxed, no-nonsense take on Texas Hold'em, built to be simple and easy to play — over an evening with friends, or solo with bots, with a smooth 80s lounge soundtrack taking you through to the river.

No pay-to-win. No mystery loot boxes. No energy timers. No premium currency. Just card cosmetics for your hand that don't affect gameplay in any way.

Play with friends in secondsHosting a game is quick and easy. Full Steam friends integration and utilizing Steam for lobbies and game invites. Featuring Peer2Peer with lobby handover in case you lose connection whilst hosting your game.

Make it yoursThe play area offers extensive customization via your own custom content or from other players in the Steam Workshop; card faces, card backs, decks, table felts... and much more.

Built to be played, not farmed• 2–8 player Texas Hold'em over Steam P2P

• Solo Play vs. bots with four personality presets — Mixed, Passive, Balanced, Aggressive. No internet required.

• Casual and Tournament Game modes Each mode is customizable to suite your mood and with a no-fuss menu system so you can get into a match in seconds.

• Game Save & Resume The game offers a quit and resume function for solo play (game state auto saves when you quit allowing you to resume or start a new game when you return), because sometimes life gets in the way!

• Find Public Games browser drops you straight into a public match — or keep your lobby friends/invite-only.

• Full Controller Support lets you play with your Xbox (or compatible), Dual Sense or Steam controller with ease.

• Original 80s inspired lounge soundtrack for the table. Add your own tracks and the game's audio player will pick them up.

• Deep cosmetic customization and Steam Workshop support built around presets and user-supplied content. Create (and share if you like!) your own artwork or download user made content from the Steam Workshop.

• Optional cosmetic DLC — Non predatory DLC currently offering animated card finishes that you can show off at the table!

• Reactions, chat, and nudges for ribbing your friends across the table.

• No ads. No energy meters. No in game currencies!

A note on Steam Deck support Hold'em Fold'em Poker is currently Steam Deck aware. It is playable but some fonts and icons may read as small for some users.
description_short: The casual, no-nonsense Texas Hold'em Poker game you can play with your friends!
